articles.title: Police investigating suspected arson at Boston’s Museum of African American History
articles.description:
“Not everybody approves of that history ... but this moment is a sobering reminder that we must continue to stand up and continue to tell this story,” the museum's president says.

The post Police investigating suspected arson at Boston’s Museum of African American History appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police are investigating a suspected arson at the Museum of African American History in Boston.
The incident occurred on June 4, 2026, raising concerns about historical preservation.
Museum president emphasizes the need to continue sharing African American history despite opposition.

articles.title: Woman, 69, killed in Swampscott fire
articles.description:
The woman was found in her apartment, the DA said.

The post Woman, 69, killed in Swampscott fire appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 69-year-old woman was killed in a fire in Swampscott.
The woman was discovered in her apartment by authorities.
This incident raises concerns about fire safety in residential buildings.

articles.title: In need of a top center, Bruins should dive into Dylan Larkin sweepstakes
articles.description:
Larkin has six seasons of 30 or more goals under his belt across 11 years with the Red Wings.

The post In need of a top center, Bruins should dive into Dylan Larkin sweepstakes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins are considering acquiring Dylan Larkin to strengthen their center position.
Larkin has scored 30 or more goals in six of his 11 NHL seasons.
A successful trade could enhance Bruins' competitiveness in the upcoming season.
